heading: Number of Federal reserve cities in district
label: 223 Number of Federal reserve cities in district
text: A Federal reserve district shall contain only one Federal reserve city.
notes: CodificationSection is based on part of the first par. of section 2 of act . Some of the other provisions of the first par. are classified to , and some were not included in the Code. For classification of other pars. of section 2 of this Act, see Codification note under .Dec. 23, 1913section 222 of this titlesection 222 of this title
